reviews.review_title: This goes out to the developers
reviews.review_description:
This looks like it could be a great game, in which it still needs a lot of improvements!
It looks like it needs tune up in the graphics alone and other glitches that goes with it as well and why do We have to press and hold down the control  stick to keep running. If we keep pressing the remote, stick down constantly all the time. Eventually, our remote will break. Please fix the issue.
In which you could press something else to run instead of the remote stick. There's so many other options
You could have on it, besides pressing the control stick down all the time. One that problem is solved with other glitches that's in the game itself. Once all those problems are fixed? I'd be more than happy to give it a great review with five stars in it that it deserves .Thank you
Well done, I think I need new underwear... Prefect it is not - but it is VERY scary. If you see this one on offer definitely have a look if you want a little something to make you crap your pants.
Game would be good with multiplayer
Game is terrifying but it would be so much cooler if it had multiplayer and better graphics

This game is one of the best horror VR games I've ever played. I love the feature where the monster can hear your voice. It makes the game more immersive and scarier. It makes for such a good horror game. I'd recommend buying this game
Graphically looks fantastic and some serious jumpscares in this one, just started love the suspense, more to come

I’ve played it for approximately an hour on both SteamVR and Quest 3, and it gives me a scare! I just have so many videos of me screaming! Made me poop in my pants. 10/10 would poop myself in the game to jumpscares again;)
w game idk why it is not that popular

reviews.review_title: Have a pair of clean underwear ready...
reviews.review_description: Haven’t really played much yet but I’m sure those 1 star ratings are from people angry for pooping their underwear, hahaha.  Kudos to the lone dev.  Indy studios are saving VR.

reviews.review_title: The perfect VR horror atmospheric title!
reviews.review_description: The game has perfect balance on the graphics and atmosphere. It gets all things right to have a tension to keep the players on theirs toes. Recommend it to everyone who loves horror titles!
Great app, graphics great,plenty of jump scares, how someone can only give one star is beyond me
